My project Inventory

A documented history of infrastructure deployments, automated workflows, and front-end architectural experiments.

Completed

WireMock Documentation Migration

Led the successful migration of WireMock's static documentation platform to MkDocs, ensuring image integrity and seamless navigation structure for a modern, scalable system[cite: 1, 2, 51].

MkDocs GitHub Actions Information Architecture

Incul Manager

A specialized Python-based utility designed to manage Incus containers with a focus on host integration, XDG menu generation, and rapid container lifecycle management[cite: 122, 127].

Python Incus LXC Shell
VIEW DETAILS →
Active

Chronograff

A time-tracking web application that visualizes time passage as intuitive progress bars. This project achieved significant viral success on Reddit with over 600K views[cite: 71, 108].

JavaScript HTML CSS UI/UX

Stable

Lakekeeper Ecosystem

Established a modern Docs-as-Code ecosystem for a Rust-native Iceberg REST Catalog, including custom theme configuration and automated build scripts[cite: 12, 13, 62].

MkDocs Rust CI/CD Docs-as-Code

AquaSee Intelligence Platform

An IoT system designed to improve fish farm productivity through real-time sensor data visualization and TIG stack integration[cite: 127].

ESP32 Telegraf InfluxDB Grafana

Fractio

An Eel-based tool for calculating document statistics, including character/word counts, estimated reading time, and readability scores[cite: 128, 129].

JavaScript Python Eel NLP

Caja-Scripts

A collection of scripts for the Caja file manager, leveraging specific variables for advanced desktop workflow automation in MATE environments[cite: 118, 119].

Development

Dream Server

A project focused on providing single-command installations for local AI platforms and sovereign intelligence, featuring a terminal-chic documentation aesthetic.
